title: Integrated three-statement
purpose: Project linked income statement, balance sheet and cash-flow outcomes.
business_questions: How do operating assumptions affect profit, cash and the balance sheet together?
Will projected statements remain internally consistent?
does_not_answer: What is the business worth without a valuation method?
appropriate_uses: Building an operating forecast prerequisite for valuation
inappropriate_uses: Valuation without explicit discount and terminal assumptions
common_misunderstandings: Three statements placed in one workbook are not necessarily integrated.
A balanced model is not automatically a reliable forecast.
